title: NEWS Neon Genesis Evangelion coming to Netflix Spring 2019
display_title: NEWS Neon Genesis Evangelion coming to Netflix Spring 2019
wikitext:
[]: [NEWS] Neon Genesis Evangelion coming to Netflix Spring 2019 Post by Guy Nacks » Mon Nov 26, 2018 11:24 pm The crew with the unlimited pockets strikes once again! https://www.newsweek.com/neon-genesis-evangelion-netflix-release-date-1232346 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=13nSISwxrY4 This is fucking huge. It'll usher in a whole new wave of fandom and WE FINALLY GET BLU-REI EOE ON FUCKING DEMAND.

[]: Neon Genesis Evangelion episodes 1-26, Death(true)², and The End of Evangelion coming to Netflix in 190 countries Post by JB2448 » Mon Nov 26, 2018 11:25 pm Official trailer on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=13nSISwxrY4 tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) In Spring of 2019 (first half of the year, some time from March 20 to June 21, 2019), Netflix is making Neon Genesis Evangelion, Death (true)², and The End of Evangelion available for streaming. Episodes 1 to 26 of Neon Genesis Evangelion The Evangelion: Death (true)² recap film of the first 24 episodes The End of Evangelion, which is comprised of 25' and 26' This will be in 190 countries worldwide. Evangelion.co.jp post about the announcement

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Nov 26, 2018 11:40 pm I'm not sure why it took any streaming service this long to get it. And I'm kinda surprised that it went to Netflix of all places.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by cyharding » Mon Nov 26, 2018 11:47 pm Now, does this news increase or decrease the possibility that we'll get a bluray release on this side of the Pacific?

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by kuzronk » Mon Nov 26, 2018 11:50 pm riffraff11235 wrote: I'm not sure why it took any streaming service this long to get it. And I'm kinda surprised that it went to Netflix of all places.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Sachi » Tue Nov 27, 2018 12:10 am This might be an early marketing move for the final Rebuild film set for the following year. Encourages new people to check out the series and films, and gets them on the hype train now for the big new film just one year later. I wouldn't be surprised now if 3.0+1.0 does manage to reach western markets sooner than later some way or another.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Nov 27, 2018 12:11 am Kind’ve a big deal. As for a Blu-ray release, I talked about the possibilities a little in the Rebuild thread, but it basically depends on what the contract Netflix has on the series is. Most likely it’s Streaming Only - they most likely can’t call it a Netflix Original and keep it in perpetuity like they did with Little Witch Academia (bought all world rights outside Japan) or Devilman Crybaby (financed the production) , especially since their ad heavily pushes how influential this series has been for 20+ years - and they’ll have some Exclusivity on NGE up until the home video release of FINAL in Japan happens. Then another company, Funimation most likely if they’re still around, could put out a physical release. At the very least I would say it makes a physical disc release of NGE + EOE unlikely until late 2021 at the earliest. But this is all hearsay. I have no idea what will happen. Distribution of visual media is changing at a rapid rate and what was the norm now won’t be the norm in six months. Shrug. Still, HD Eva is pretty cool!

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Joseki » Tue Nov 27, 2018 2:26 am Quoting myself from the 2020 thread that I read first Joseki wrote: I believe the NGE movie (EOE or The Feature Film) may be getting a worldwide theaters run next year in Spring too by the way. At the beginning of this month the italian publisher of NGE/Rebuild/bunch of Anno stuff at a panel said they have an open slot in May for a movie they can't announce yet because of negotiations still in play, but they asked us to "pray the angels" for the contract to be signed. Finger crossed for the Blu Ray release.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by pwhodges » Tue Nov 27, 2018 3:36 am Given that Funimation also streams it's a big blow for them, and emphasises how specialist companies are being squeezed by the sheer size and money of companies like NetFlix.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by robersora » Tue Nov 27, 2018 5:55 am Thank God finally *someone* did something about this intolerable state. I'm sure the rights weren't exactly cheap, so for Netflix to renew the contract/make Blu-Reis available/doing something with rebuild; all that depends on what streaming numbers the series is able to pull. I'm sure expectations are very different, since Evangelion is an old classic in a delicate licensing situation. I'm curious as to if they have the rights for the dub? Do you think Netflix might redub the show? I hope, at least the subs are ok... I've never used Netflix before, what is their track record with quality of translation and dubbing (especially in the Anime sphere?)

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by hui43210 » Tue Nov 27, 2018 6:54 am Super cool news! It’s about time Khara licensed out the show. I’m not actually surprised that Netflix was the one to get it, I gather, although can’t say for sure, that it was Khara asking for an insane price for the rights that kept Eva off streaming for so long. Netflix would the only one who could afford it plus have the world wide reach that Khara probably would want to promote the show ahead of the last movie. I really hope they do give a complete redub, after 23 years the show needs whole sale changes in that regard. Netflix dubs have been fairly good, and when they aren’t, see Aico, they give it a complete redubbing. However, I gather their record subbed is spotty. I’ve seen a lot of complaints about them, and while I don’t know enough Japanese(I’m learning though!) to tell for myself, watching FateExtra with friends who know more has led me to believe those complaints are founded.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Joseki » Tue Nov 27, 2018 7:26 am After the initial joy for the announcement I think I'm pessimist about it. I don't see any reason why Netflix should renow the rights after they'll expire (especially if they are expensive and being a 25 years old anime the views should be pretty frontloaded), and if we don't get a BD release now the situation will be exactly as it is today. Plus the audio and quality video on Netflix is generally not as good as a classic home video release, and of course I wouldn't own the series. I'm sure a lot of people will watch NGE for the first time because of this, khara will get a lot of $$$ and the 3.0+1.0 hype will grow exponentially, however this does nothing for me.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by SpaceCowboy35 » Tue Nov 27, 2018 8:05 am FUUUUUUUUUUCCCCCCCKKKKKKK YEAH!!!!!!!!!! I bought a dvd for nothing...

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Blockio » Tue Nov 27, 2018 8:25 am Three words: HELL! FUCKING! YES!

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by hui43210 » Tue Nov 27, 2018 8:30 am Joseki wrote: I'm sure a lot of people will watch NGE for the first time because of this, khara will get a lot of $$$ and the 3.0+1.0 hype will grow exponentially, however this does nothing for me.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Arcadia's legacy » Tue Nov 27, 2018 8:43 am I do wonder though, if the release will include the Directors cuts of Ep 21 - 24?

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Ambiant23 » Tue Nov 27, 2018 9:03 am HOOOLLLLY SHIIIIIT! That said I hope they fixed some translation errors that ADV had.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by hui43210 » Tue Nov 27, 2018 9:13 am Ambiant23 wrote: HOOOLLLLY SHIIIIIT! That said I hope they fixed some translation errors that ADV had.

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Joseki » Tue Nov 27, 2018 9:15 am Arcadia's legacy wrote: I do wonder though, if the release will include the Directors cuts of Ep 21 - 24?

[]: Re: NETFLIX FUCKING DID IT!!! NGE/EOE Streams Spring 2019 Post by Ambiant23 » Tue Nov 27, 2018 9:53 am Agreed EoE's translation completely ruins the meaning of the movie
